response.step_by_step_log: 1. Auditory analysis: Listened to the entire video (00:00-04:59). 2. Observed: The video features Minecraft gameplay with consistent spoken dialogue between VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis and visitors (Usada Pekora, Natsuiro Matsuri, Isaki Riona), along with standard Minecraft ambient game sounds (footsteps, placing blocks). 3. Result: No vocal music was detected in any segment of this video. 4. JSON generation: Structured the video into three thematic scenes based on participant interaction and activity, with no vocal music metadata.
response.global_summary: A segment of a Minecraft stream where the VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis interacts with other VTubers while building. The audio consists entirely of spoken conversation and Minecraft game sound effects. There is no vocal music present in this segment.

scenes.description: Ninomae Ina'nis is building a wooden structure in Minecraft alone, interacting with the chat.
Usada Pekora enters the game and provides light inside the structure for Ina.
Ninomae Ina'nis interacts with other visitors (Natsuiro Matsuri, Isaki Riona) and discusses food and farming resources.
